political.s: FEC: $310K in executive political donations; partisan lean split across 14 executive donors.

charity.s: $15M reported corporate giving in 2024 (~0.09% of revenue) via Kohl's Cares.
charity.focus: Family health and wellness, youth development, mental health support

guns.s: No federal firearms license on record for this company in the ATF FFL registry — no licensed firearms dealing or manufacturing.

execPay.s: CEO-to-median-worker pay ratio 593:1 (median employee pay $15,859) — SEC proxy statement (DEF 14A, 2026).

wiki.extract: Kohl's Corporation is an American department store retail chain. It currently has 1,174 locations, operating stores in every U.S. state except Hawaii. The company was founded by Polish immigrant Maxwell Kohl, who opened a corner grocery store in Milwaukee, Wisconsin, in 1927. It went on to become a successful chain in the local area, and in 1962 the company branched out by opening its first department store. British American Tobacco Company took a controlling interest in the company in 1972 while still managed by the Kohl Family, and in 1979, the corporation was sold to BATUS Inc. A group of i

sampleRecords.event_description: Struck by running powered equipment  during maintenance, cleaning, testing
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was utilizing an inclined conveyor belt in the stock room to transport a bathroom rug to the second floor. She was at the bottom of the conveyor belt when the rug fell into the conveyor roller mechanism, jamming it. She was working to clear the jam when her right arm became caught in the 3.5-inch gap between the powered conveyor belt and the underside roller. The employee was hospitali

sampleRecords.event_description: Fall on same level due to slip or trip
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee tripped over a rug and fell on her right side, suffering a broken right hip.

sampleRecords.event_description: Fall on same level due to slip or trip
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was walking across the carpeted floor when she tripped and fell to the floor. The employee was hospitalized with a fractured shoulder.

sampleRecords.event_description: Fall on same level due to slip or trip
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was cleaning an aisle when she tripped over a rolling rack and fell to the floor, breaking a hip.

sampleRecords.event_description: Other fall to lower level  less than 6 feet
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was standing on a ladder, installing hooks on a shelving unit. The employee fell to the floor about 3 feet below and suffered a broken elbow.

topHazards.label: The tea light candle holder can catch on fire, posing a fire and burn hazard.
The chair can break or collapse when weight is applied, posing a fall hazard.
The candle's high flames can ignite the surface of the wax or cause the glass to break, posing fire and burn hazards.
The slow cooker's control panel can overheat and melt, posing a fire hazard.

sampleRecalls.title: Kohl's Recalls Tea Light Candle Holders Due to Fire Hazard
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves St. Nicholas Square Christmas Tea Light Candle Holders. The candle holders are shaped like a Christmas tree made from plastic horseshoes and hold six tea light candles. There is a gold star at the top of the candle holder and green plastic garland with plastic red berries at the base of the candle…
hazards: The tea light candle holder can catch on fire, posing a fire and burn hazard.
injuries: The firm has received two reports of tea light candle holders catching on fire. No injuries have been reported.
products: St. Nicholas Square Christmas Tea Light Candle Holders

sampleRecalls.title: Kohl's Recalls SONOMA Goods For Life Branded Ultimate Oversized Antigravity Chairs Due to Fall Hazard
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves SONOMA Goods For Life-branded Ultimate Oversized Antigravity Chairs in numerous colors. The chairs have an aluminum frame, a fabric seat/back, and a removable head pillow that is attached with Velcro. The tubes of the aluminum legs are square. The eyelets attaching the fabric to the frame are cove…
hazards: The chair can break or collapse when weight is applied, posing a fall hazard.
injuries: Kohl's has received 18 reports of the chairs breaking or collapsing, including two reports of minor injuries.
products: SONOMA Goods For Life Branded Ultimate Oversized Antigravity Chairs

sampleRecalls.title: Kohl's Recalls Three-Wick SONOMA Goods For Life Branded Candles Due to Fire and Burn Hazards
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves SONOMA Goods For Life three-wick candles in the following models and scents: Model Fragrance Style Number UPC Date Code GROW Cape Jasmine 01SNGDD01 400681131954 10/19 HOME SWEET HOME White Lotus & Lilac 01SNGDD03 400292653180 10/19 SAIL AWAY Sunday Funday 01SNGDD04 400189096090 10/19 LIVE SIMPLY M…
hazards: The candle's high flames can ignite the surface of the wax or cause the glass to break, posing fire and burn hazards.
injuries: Kohl's has received 29 reports involving high flames and/or breaking glass containers with the three-wick candles, including five incidents resulting in minor burn injuries and six incidents involvin…
products: SONOMA Goods For Life branded three-wick candles

sampleRecalls.title: Slow Cookers Recalled by Sensio Due to Fire Hazard; Sold Exclusively at Kohl's Department Stores
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves the Bella Kitchen 5-quart programmable slow cookers. Only slow cookers with model number WJ-5000DE and date codes 0907 or 0909 are included in this recall. The slow cookers are black and "Bella Kitchen" is marked on the control panel. The model number and the four-digit date code are printed on a …
hazards: The slow cooker's control panel can overheat and melt, posing a fire hazard.
injuries: Sensio has received 60 reports of the control panels of the slow cookers smoking, melting and sparking and three reports of panels catching fire. Fourteen incidents resulted in minor damage to counte…

sampleRecalls.title: The Cayre Group Recalls Hooded Sweatshirts with Drawstrings Sold at Kohl's for Strangulation Hazard
sampleRecalls.description: The recalled hoodie style zip front hooded sweatshirts were sold in four youth sizes S (7-8), M (9-12), L (14) and XL (16.) The sweatshirts have drawstrings through the hood and were available in two colors, Blue Bell and Demitasse. A tag sewn on the inside of the garment reads "Candie's."
hazards: These sweatshirts have a drawstring through the hood, posing a strangulation hazard to children.
injuries: No incidents or injuries have been reported.
products: Candie's Brand Children's Hoodie Sweatshirts with Drawstrings
